dosingInfo.rawDosageText: DOSAGE & ADMINISTRATION Because of possible physical incompatilitbilites, SOLU-CORTEF should not be diluted or mixed with other solutions. Parenteral drug products should be inspected visually for particulate matter and discoloration prior to administration, whenever solution and container permit. This preparation may be administered by intravenous injection, by intravenous infusion, or by intramuscular injection, the preferred method for initial emergency use being intravenous injection.
